sections.sectionTitle: Kamsangpa in Tehna Khau a Mi Khat a Muhna

verses.text: Ka muhna dang khat leuleu-ah, a khutsungah tehna khau a tawi mi khat ka mu hi
Koi-a pai ding na hi hiam, ci-in ka dot ciangin amah in, “Jerusalem khuapi a sauna ka theihna dingin a teh dingin a pai ding ka hi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin vantung mipa hong paikhia a, vantung midang khat in amah na dawntuah hi

Tua ciangin vantung mi a masapa in a dawntuahpa kiangah, “Va tai in la, tehna khau a tawi tangvalpa kiangah hih thu va gen in. Jerusalem khuasungah mihing leh ganhing tam mahmah ding ahih manin Jerusalem kulhhuam sungah ta zolo ding uh hi
Tua khuapi a hu dingin meikulh bangin Topa mahmah a omna ding, leh tua khuasungah a minthan'na tawh a ten'na ding thu, Topa in kam ciamzo hi, ci-in va gen in,” a ci hi.
Topa in ama mite kiangah, “Mun khempeuhah note kong thehthang khin hi. Ahi zongin tu-in Babylon panin taikhia-in Jerusalem-ah ciahkik un
Babylon-ah a om mite aw, Zion-ah tai un,” ci hi

Hih bangin maang ka muh khit ciangin, ama mite' na a sutgawp minam dangte kiangah thu a gen dingin Vanglian Topa in kei hong sawl a, Topa' mite a su mi peuhpeuh in a mit nauta bangin a manphapen khat a su ahi hi

Topa mahmah in note hong su ding a, nidanga note' na hong sepsak mite in tu-in note' nate hong lehsuh kik ding uh hi, hong cisak hi. Hih bangin thu hong pian' ciangin Vanglian Topa in kei hong sawl ahih lamtak na thei ding uh hi
Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: “Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin la sa un. Note tawh a hong omkhawm ta ding ka hi hi,” ci hi
Tua hun ciangin Topa kiangah minam tampi hong pai ding uh a, ama mite a suak ding uh hi. Topa in note hong ompih ding a, tua ciangin note kiangah kei a hong sawl ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi
Judah mite pen gam siangtho sungah Topa' neihtuam hong suakkik ding a, Jerusalem khua pen ama it penpen khuapi hong hi kik ding hi
Mi khempeuh aw, Topa' mai-ah gamdai-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho ama omna mun panin amah hong paikhia ta hi.
